name: Cobot vs Manual Labor Comparator
description: Industrial-grade decision support tool comparing collaborative robot (cobot) investment against manual labor costs, incorporating Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO standards.

inputs.label: Annual Manual Labor Cost (per FTE)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost per full-time equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.

label_i18n.tr: Yıllık Manuel İşçilik Maliyeti (tam zamanlı eşdeğer başına)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual cost per full-time equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ücretler, yan haklar ve genel giderler dahil tam zamanlı eşdeğer işçi başına toplam yıllık maliyet.

inputs.label: Number of Workers Replaced
inputs.businessContext: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir cobot tarafından değiştirilebilecek veya desteklenebilecek manuel işçi sayısı.

inputs.label: Cobot Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Initial capital expenditure for the cobot including end-effector and controller.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial capital expenditure for the cobot including end-effector and controller.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uç efektör ve kontrolör dahil cobot için ilk sermaye harcaması.

inputs.label: Cobot Annual Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık servis sözleşmesi, yedek parçalar ve yazılım güncellemeleri.

inputs.label: Cobot Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büyük revizyon veya değiştirme öncesi beklenen operasyonel ömür.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital for NPV calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital for NPV calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: NBD hesaplaması için ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti.

inputs.label: Manual Labor Productivity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Manuel işçilik için verimlilik faktörü (1.0 = %100 verimli, 0.85 = molalar/hatalarla tipik).

inputs.label: Cobot Uptime
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of scheduled time the cobot is operational (excluding planned maintenance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of scheduled time the cobot is operational (excluding planned maintenance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cobot'un planlı bakım hariç programlanan sürenin yüzdesi olarak çalışır durumda olduğu süre.

rules.message: For double shifts, consider at least 2 workers replaced to justify investment.
Training cost is set to zero because include_training_cost is false.
Discount rate should be between 2% and 20%.

thresholds.alert: Payback period exceeds cobot lifespan. Investment may not be viable.
Net present value is negative. Consider alternative automation or process improvement.
ROI below 15% threshold. Review assumptions or consider lean improvements first.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
